description: Designed text-only graphic card on a plain white background, formatted like a news headline or press-release excerpt with no photos, people, or seals. The headline is in a large dark slate-blue serif font: 'Labor Department Awards $105 Million to Expand Mine Safety and Health Training'. Beneath it, in smaller italic slate-blue serif text, is a sub-line: 'Federal funding from the U.S. Department of Labor, administered by MSHA, will support mine safety and health training programs nationwide, expanding education and hazard awareness in a high-risk industry.'
notable_text: Labor Department Awards $105 Million to Expand Mine Safety and Health Training; Federal funding from the U.S. Department of Labor, administered by MSHA, will support mine safety and health training programs nationwide...
